title: Six Degrees Could Change the World Vocabulary

section.title: Six Degrees Could Change the World Vocabulary
section.summary: Extensive list of environmental, scientific, and disaster-related vocabulary concerning climate change.

questions.prompt: What is the French translation for the expression '(to be at) a crossroads'?
questions.explanation: According to the vocabulary list, '(to be at) a crossroads' translates to '(être à) la croisée des chemins'.

questions.prompt: How is the phrase 'out of control' translated in the context of climate change?
questions.explanation: The source document translates 'out of control' as 'Galopant, incontrôlable'.

questions.explanation: The vocabulary list provides 'vite, bientôt' as the translation for 'soon'.
